risks.message: Board has limited visible fiducial strategy for assembly alignment
risks.recommendation: Add global fiducials to improve assembly registration and inspection consistency.
risks.why_it_matters: Consistent fiducial strategy helps automated assembly and optical alignment stay reliable.
risks.trigger_condition: Visible fiducial count fell below the configured assembly threshold.

explanation.root_cause: General design issue

fix_suggestion.fix: Add global fiducials to improve assembly registration and inspection consistency.

risks.message: Ground test-point coverage appears limited for bring-up and probing
risks.recommendation: Add at least one accessible ground test point so probing and scope reference setup are easier during bring-up.
risks.why_it_matters: Ground test points are foundational for repeatable probing, debug, and validation.
risks.trigger_condition: Visible ground test-point count fell below the configured minimum.

explanation.root_cause: General design issue

fix_suggestion.fix: Add at least one accessible ground test point so probing and scope reference setup are easier during bring-up.

risks.message: Critical or debug-oriented net CTRL has no visible test point
risks.recommendation: Expose this net through a test point, header, or accessible debug pad to improve bring-up and manufacturing test coverage.
risks.why_it_matters: Critical nets that cannot be probed easily make validation, factory test, and field debug slower and more expensive.
risks.trigger_condition: A critical or debug-oriented net was identified without any visible test-point component.
risks.threshold_label: Expected at least one visible access point on critical nets

explanation.root_cause: General design issue

fix_suggestion.fix: Expose this net through a test point, header, or accessible debug pad to improve bring-up and manufacturing test coverage.

risks.message: U1 (driver) has no nearby decoupling capacitor
risks.recommendation: Place a decoupling capacitor close to the device power pin and on the relevant supply net.
risks.trigger_condition: Nearest valid decoupling capacitor exceeded the configured decoupling distance threshold.
risks.observed_label: Observed nearest capacitor distance: none found

explanation.root_cause: Power delivery path impedance or placement issue

fix_suggestion.fix: Place a 0.1uF decoupling capacitor close to the IC power pin, ideally within the configured threshold of 4.0.

risks.message: U2 (mcu) has no nearby decoupling capacitor
risks.recommendation: Place a decoupling capacitor close to the device power pin and on the relevant supply net.
risks.trigger_condition: Nearest valid decoupling capacitor exceeded the configured decoupling distance threshold.
risks.observed_label: Observed nearest capacitor distance: none found

explanation.root_cause: Power delivery path impedance or placement issue

fix_suggestion.fix: Place a 0.1uF decoupling capacitor close to the IC power pin, ideally within the configured threshold of 4.0.

risks.message: U1 appears to lack enough local decoupling support
risks.recommendation: Add or reposition local bypass capacitors close to the device supply pins with short return paths.
risks.trigger_condition: Component power pins did not have enough nearby local decoupling capacitors within the configured local-support radius.

explanation.root_cause: Power delivery path impedance or placement issue

fix_suggestion.fix: Improve regulator-to-load placement, shorten power paths, widen traces, and reduce unnecessary vias.

risks.message: U1 may be missing nearby bulk capacitance support
risks.recommendation: Place appropriate bulk capacitance near the converter or regulator input/output path to reduce transients and rail collapse risk.
risks.trigger_condition: No likely bulk capacitor was found inside the configured regulator-support radius.

explanation.root_cause: Power delivery path impedance or placement issue

fix_suggestion.fix: Improve regulator-to-load placement, shorten power paths, widen traces, and reduce unnecessary vias.

risks.message: U2 appears to lack enough local decoupling support
risks.recommendation: Add or reposition local bypass capacitors close to the device supply pins with short return paths.
risks.trigger_condition: Component power pins did not have enough nearby local decoupling capacitors within the configured local-support radius.

explanation.root_cause: Power delivery path impedance or placement issue

fix_suggestion.fix: Improve regulator-to-load placement, shorten power paths, widen traces, and reduce unnecessary vias.

risks.message: U1 is connected to a critical net but no ground reference was identified
risks.recommendation: Verify that this component has an appropriate nearby ground reference or return path for the connected critical net.

explanation.root_cause: Missing or poor return path
explanation.impact: Increased EMI and unstable signal reference

fix_suggestion.fix: Ensure the component has a valid ground reference and a clear low-impedance return path to the board ground network.

risks.message: J1 is not connected to a valid power rail
risks.recommendation: Connect the component to the intended power net and confirm that its pad-to-net assignments are present in the board data.

explanation.root_cause: Power delivery path impedance or placement issue

fix_suggestion.fix: Connect the affected component to the intended power rail and verify that the configured power-net definitions match the board design.

risks.message: U1 is not connected to a valid power rail
risks.recommendation: Connect the component to the intended power net and confirm that its pad-to-net assignments are present in the board data.

explanation.root_cause: Power delivery path impedance or placement issue

fix_suggestion.fix: Connect the affected component to the intended power rail and verify that the configured power-net definitions match the board design.

risks.message: U2 has ground but no visible power rail
risks.recommendation: Verify that the component is connected to the intended supply net as well as ground.

explanation.root_cause: Power delivery path impedance or placement issue

fix_suggestion.fix: Connect the affected component to the intended power rail and verify that the configured power-net definitions match the board design.

risks.message: Ground net GND has limited visible connectivity (1 connections)
risks.recommendation: Review grounding strategy and ensure intended loads and returns are visibly tied into the board ground structure.
risks.why_it_matters: Insufficient ground connectivity can increase susceptibility to EMI, transient issues, and inconsistent field behavior.
risks.trigger_condition: Ground connectivity count fell below the configured reliability threshold.

explanation.root_cause: General design issue

fix_suggestion.fix: Review grounding strategy and ensure intended loads and returns are visibly tied into the board ground structure.

risks.message: U1 is connected to critical net(s) CTRL but has no direct ground-reference net
risks.recommendation: Review this signal path and ensure it has a nearby continuous ground reference and a clean return path.
risks.trigger_condition: Critical-signal component lacked a direct configured ground-reference net.
risks.threshold_label: Required ground nets: GND, GROUND, PGND

explanation.root_cause: Missing or poor return path
explanation.impact: Increased EMI and unstable signal reference

fix_suggestion.fix: Route the signal closer to a continuous ground reference and reduce gaps, layer transitions, or broken return paths.

risks.message: High-voltage pad on U1:HV+ is close to U1:CTRL
risks.recommendation: Increase conductor spacing or introduce isolation features that meet the intended voltage-class clearance target.
risks.why_it_matters: Clearance shortfalls in elevated-voltage regions can create direct insulation and safety failures.
risks.trigger_condition: A high-voltage pad-to-pad spacing fell below the configured clearance threshold.

explanation.root_cause: General design issue

fix_suggestion.fix: Increase conductor spacing or introduce isolation features that meet the intended voltage-class clearance target.

risks.message: High-voltage pad on U1:HV- is close to U1:CTRL
risks.recommendation: Increase conductor spacing or introduce isolation features that meet the intended voltage-class clearance target.
risks.why_it_matters: Clearance shortfalls in elevated-voltage regions can create direct insulation and safety failures.
risks.trigger_condition: A high-voltage pad-to-pad spacing fell below the configured clearance threshold.

explanation.root_cause: General design issue

fix_suggestion.fix: Increase conductor spacing or introduce isolation features that meet the intended voltage-class clearance target.

risks.message: U1 appears to have limited nearby thermal via support (0)
risks.recommendation: Add thermal vias or improve heat escape near this power-dissipating component.
risks.why_it_matters: Power-dissipating parts often need nearby thermal vias to move heat into more copper area or additional layers.
risks.trigger_condition: Nearby thermal-via count fell below the configured heat-exit support threshold.

explanation.root_cause: Thermal concentration or poor heat spreading
explanation.impact: Hotspots, reduced reliability, or thermal stress

fix_suggestion.fix: Improve thermal distribution with better spacing, copper spreading, or thermal-aware placement.

risks.message: U1 connects to relatively narrow copper for heat spreading (0.24)
risks.recommendation: Increase local copper width or area around this component to improve heat spreading.
risks.why_it_matters: Narrow connected copper can limit heat spreading and increase hotspot risk around power components.
risks.trigger_condition: Connected copper width fell below the configured thermal spreading threshold.

explanation.root_cause: Thermal concentration or poor heat spreading
explanation.impact: Hotspots, reduced reliability, or thermal stress

fix_suggestion.fix: Improve thermal distribution with better spacing, copper spreading, or thermal-aware placement.

risks.message: Physics estimate suggests CTRL is off target impedance (66.2 ohms vs 50.0 ohms)
risks.recommendation: Adjust trace geometry, reference height, or stackup assumptions to bring the line closer to its impedance target.
risks.why_it_matters: A characteristic impedance shift can create reflection, eye closure, and timing margin loss on fast nets.
risks.trigger_condition: A first-principles microstrip estimate exceeded the configured impedance tolerance.

explanation.root_cause: Signal path geometry or routing issue

fix_suggestion.fix: Reduce path length, simplify routing, and keep critical signals on cleaner and more direct routes.

risks.message: Digital control logic is present without a clearly classified debug or test subsystem.
risks.recommendation: Confirm bring-up access through debug headers, test pads, or programming entry points.
risks.why_it_matters: Boards are harder to validate when debug access is weak or missing.

explanation.root_cause: General design issue

fix_suggestion.fix: Confirm bring-up access through debug headers, test pads, or programming entry points.

risks.recommendation: Adjust trace geometry, reference height, or stackup assumptions to bring the line closer to its impedance target.

executive_summary.headline: Board needs focused engineering review
executive_summary.summary: This board shows high design risk. The main risk concentration is in power integrity. The highest-priority issue is High-voltage pad on U1:HV+ is close to U1:CTRL. The current design snapshot includes 3 components and 4 nets. The board is likely functional at a prototype level, but the highlighted issues should be addressed before stronger production confidence.
